objective: Close F-0070 by replacing hard-coded knowledge_node questionCount values with one batched aggregate over question_knowledge_node for every returned list, update and disable projection. Count all durable bindings, including disabled questions, because lifecycle impact must preserve and disclose existing references. Preserve schemas, write semantics, authorization and UI contracts.
blockedFiles: role, permission, authorization or entitlement changes
persistent database execution or real data access
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.ui: AdminKnowledgeNodeManagement already renders and aggregates questionCount; no UI contract change is required once the repository projection is truthful.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routesServices: Both content-question-material and rag-resource-knowledge runtimes forward their repository DTOs without recomputing questionCount.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repositories: The two production knowledge_node list repositories and the RAG update/disable return path currently map questionCount to the literal zero.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: question_knowledge_node is the durable binding authority and already has a knowledge_node_id index; a grouped count over the returned node IDs requires no schema change.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: A focused aggregate test covers zero, multiple bindings and one batched query; repository regression proves both production paths consume the aggregate and mutation audit behavior remains atomic.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No schema/migration, real database execution, question status filtering, authorization, dependency, Provider, external service, UI, mechanism or write-semantic change.
